# PR Review

## 1. Overall Understanding

This PR adds a retry wrapper around the payment webhook handler.

## 2. Review Contract

General profile. No explicit agent-system declaration; no signals detected.

## 3. Change and Execution Map

input -> validate -> call payment provider -> persist -> ack

## 4. What Looks Strong

Test coverage for the happy path is thorough.

## 5. Blocking Findings

### PR-C-001 — Retry may duplicate an external side effect
- Evidence state: verified (confidence: high)
- Merge impact: blocker
- Location: src/handler.py:10-20
- Observation: Something was observed.

### PR-G-001 — Buyi invariant made bypassable
- Evidence state: verified (confidence: high)
- Merge impact: blocker
- Location: backend/security/masking.py:5-8
- Observation: Something was observed.
- Source: sanyi (BY-2)

## 6. Important Findings

_None._

## 7. Questions and Unverified Hypotheses

### PR-A-001 — Unclear how partial success is surfaced to the caller
- Evidence state: question (confidence: high)
- Merge impact: question
- Location: src/handler.py:30-35
- Observation: Something was observed.

## 8. Suggestions

_None._

## 9. Testing and Evaluation Assessment

No test covers the partial-success path.

## 10. Definition of Done Assessment

Rollback plan is undocumented.
